title: Author a component library with no compile warnings
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/kit.ex (module MyAppWeb.Kit). Declare four function components: card/1 (attr :class, :rest :global, slot :inner_block), button/1 (attr :type with values ["button","submit"], attr :variant with values ["primary","secondary"], :rest :global, slot :inner_block), input/1 (attr :field FormField, attr :label string required, attr :type default "text", :rest :global), and badge/1 (attr :label string required, attr :kind with values ["info","warning","error"]). Each attr must have correct type. No slot attributes with :default (would be a compile warning).
tier_rationale: Four components with varied attrs/slots. Must avoid the `:default` on slot compile warning and the `attr + slot same name` compile error.
